ui.mission_joyride: Explore & Use 49+ AI Tools and Earn 50 Skill Points everyday you use and practice
conditions: 1. Users must interact with a new AI tool every 4 hours to earn 50 points.
2. Only the first interaction within each 4-hour window will be counted towards points.
3. Repeated use of the same tool is allowed, but only the first use within the window will earn points.
4. Users can earn a maximum of 300 points per day from a single AI tool.
5. To continue earning points, users must switch to a different AI tool every 4 hours.
ui.earn_points_msg: Earn 50 Skill Points for one time usage of the tool.
ui.compare_text_msg: Compare the original and paraphrased text.

73.title: Edit Pad
73.content: Edit Pad is a simple online text editor for quick writing and editing, offering an accessible platform for note-taking, brainstorming, and drafting without the need for software installation.

74.title: Excel
74.content: Microsoft Excel is a versatile spreadsheet program that enables data analysis, visualization, and automation, widely used for both personal and professional productivity tasks.

75.title: AppliTools
75.content: AppliTools is a visual AI testing and monitoring platform that automates UI testing and ensures pixel-perfect interfaces across devices and browsers.

76.title: ElevenLabs
76.content: ElevenLabs is a leading AI-powered voice synthesis platform that delivers lifelike, customizable speech for audiobooks, games, and other creative projects.

77.title: Functionze
77.content: Functionze is an AI-powered testing solution that automates functional, visual, and performance testing for web and mobile applications.

78.title: Grammarly
78.content: Grammarly is a widely used AI writing assistant that helps improve grammar, spelling, tone, and clarity in real time, catering to both casual and professional writers.

79.title: Kapwing
79.content: Kapwing is an online video and image editing platform that offers AI-powered tools for creating, resizing, and enhancing multimedia content with ease.

80.title: OpusClip
80.content: OpusClip uses AI to transform long-form videos into short, engaging clips optimized for social media platforms, boosting reach and engagement.

81.title: Photopea
81.content: Photopea is a free online photo editor with advanced features similar to Photoshop, supporting PSD, AI, and other popular image formats.

82.title: Recraft
82.content: Recraft is an AI-powered design tool for generating high-quality illustrations, icons, and graphics tailored to your creative needs.

83.title: Alphasense
83.content: Alphasense is an AI-driven market intelligence platform that helps businesses analyze data, discover insights, and make informed decisions.

84.title: BeepBox
84.content: BeepBox is an easy-to-use online music creation tool that lets users compose and share chiptune-style melodies directly from their browser.

85.title: ChatGPT
85.content: ChatGPT is an advanced AI chatbot by OpenAI that can answer questions, generate content, and assist with tasks using natural language understanding.

86.title: Claude
86.content: Claude is an AI assistant by Anthropic designed for thoughtful conversation, creative writing, and problem-solving, with a focus on safety and reliability.

87.title: Compass
87.content: Compass is an Atlassian tool that provides insights, documentation, and team coordination for software projects, enhancing productivity and collaboration.

88.title: Dall-E 3
88.content: DALL·E 3 is OpenAI’s advanced image generation model, capable of producing detailed, high-quality visuals from natural language prompts.

89.title: DeepSeek
89.content: DeepSeek is an AI-powered search and research platform that analyzes large datasets to extract precise, actionable insights.

90.title: Descript
90.content: Descript is an all-in-one audio and video editing platform with AI tools for transcription, overdubbing, and easy drag-and-drop editing.

91.title: Firefly
91.content: Adobe Firefly is a generative AI tool that creates stunning images, text effects, and designs tailored for creative professionals.

92.title: FlexClip
92.content: FlexClip is an online video maker and editor with AI-powered templates, animations, and effects for creating professional-quality videos effortlessly.

93.title: Frase IO
93.content: Frase IO is an AI writing and SEO optimization platform that helps create, research, and optimize content for better search rankings.

94.title: Gemini
94.content: Gemini is Google DeepMind's multimodal AI model, designed to handle text, image, and code tasks with high accuracy and efficiency.

95.title: GitHub Copilot
95.content: GitHub Copilot is an AI coding assistant powered by OpenAI, providing real-time code suggestions and accelerating software development.

96.title: Gretel
96.content: Gretel offers AI-powered synthetic data generation and anonymization tools for creating privacy-preserving datasets.

97.title: Grok
97.content: Grok is an AI chatbot developed by xAI, designed for humor-infused, insightful, and context-aware interactions on X (formerly Twitter).

98.title: Gumloop
98.content: Gumloop is a no-code AI workflow automation tool that connects various apps and AI models to streamline tasks app.

99.title: IBM Watson
99.content: IBM Watson is a suite of enterprise-ready AI services, applications, and tools for building intelligent workflows and solutions.

100.title: Jasper
100.content: Jasper is an AI writing assistant that creates engaging marketing copy, blogs, and social content tailored to your brand voice.

101.title: Midjourney
101.content: Midjourney is an AI image generation tool that transforms text prompts into highly artistic and detailed visuals.

102.title: N8n
102.content: N8n is an open-source workflow automation tool that integrates APIs and services, enabling complex workflows with minimal coding.

103.title: Notion AI
103.content: Notion AI enhances the Notion workspace with AI features for writing, summarizing, brainstorming, and managing information efficiently.

104.title: Path AI
104.content: Path AI develops AI-powered pathology tools to assist doctors in diagnosing diseases more accurately and efficiently.

105.title: Perplexity AI
105.content: Perplexity AI is a conversational search engine that uses AI to provide direct, cited, and context-aware answers to questions.

106.title: Pinetools
106.content: Pinetools offers a variety of simple online tools for editing images, texts, and numbers directly from the browser.

107.title: Pixlr
107.content: Pixlr is a free online photo editor with AI-assisted tools for quick and professional image editing.

108.title: Resoomer
108.content: Resoomer is an AI summarization tool that condenses long texts into clear, concise summaries for faster understanding.

109.title: Runway ML
109.content: Runway ML is an AI creative suite offering tools for video editing, image generation, and other multimedia projects.

110.title: Slick Write
110.content: Slick Write is an online grammar and style checker that helps improve clarity, structure, and readability of writing.

111.title: Smodin
111.content: Smodin is an AI-powered writing platform offering tools for paraphrasing, summarizing, and multilingual content generation.

112.title: Stable Diffusion
112.content: Stable Diffusion is an open-source AI model that generates high-quality images from natural language prompts.

113.title: Synthesia
113.content: Synthesia is an AI video creation platform that generates talking avatars for training, marketing, and presentations.

114.title: Tableau
114.content: Tableau is a leading data visualization platform that helps create interactive and shareable dashboards from various data sources.

115.title: Testim
115.content: Testim uses AI to accelerate software testing by automating test creation, execution, and maintenance.

116.title: Textfx
116.content: Textfx is an AI tool from Google designed for experimenting with language, offering creative text transformations and generation.

117.title: Tome
117.content: Tome is an AI storytelling tool that helps create visually engaging presentations and documents quickly.

118.title: UI Path
118.content: UiPath is a leading robotic process automation (RPA) platform that uses AI to automate repetitive business tasks.

119.title: You.com
119.content: You.com is an AI-powered search engine that answers queries directly, integrates chat, and provides summarized results.

120.title: Zapier Agents
120.content: Zapier Agents lets you create AI-powered automation bots that interact with apps, APIs, and workflows seamlessly.
